message:
Add unit tests for min() and findOverlap() helpers

Expand archiver test coverage with focused tests for helper functions:

min() tests:
- Standard comparisons (a < b, b < a)
- Zero values
- Negative numbers

findOverlap() edge cases:
- Empty prev or curr slices
- No overlap at all
- Last line of prev appears mid-curr
- Single line prev matches first of curr
- Complete match
- Suffix overlap patterns

These tests improve coverage of pure functions without touching
integration test complexity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
